message:
refactor(traits): Replace inline type checks with trait functions

Major refactoring of 11 files to use centralized trait functions:
- string_traits: isString(), isBytes(), isStringLike()
- container_traits: isList(), isDict(), isTuple(), isSet(), isArray()
- type_traits: isUnknown(), isNumeric(), isIntegral(), isFloating(), isBoolean()

Files refactored:
- src/codegen/native/expressions/operators/arithmetic.zig
- src/codegen/native/expressions/operators/comparison.zig
- src/codegen/native/expressions/subscript.zig
- src/codegen/native/expressions/comprehensions.zig
- src/codegen/native/statements/assign.zig
- src/codegen/native/statements/print.zig
- src/analysis/native_types/expressions.zig
- src/analysis/native_types/core.zig

Also fixes:
- ceval.zig: Add eval alias (was missing, caused runtime error)
- pickle_mod.zig: Unwrap PyBytes in genLoads() (type mismatch fix)
